Autotrader.note: Blocked/unavailable to automated browser. Page title was 'Autotrader - page unavailable' with message: 'We're sorry for any inconvenience, but the site is currently unavailable.' No usable listings were observed directly from Autotrader.

Cars.com.note: Blocked by Cloudflare to automated browser. Page title was 'Attention Required! | Cloudflare' with message: 'Sorry, you have been blocked.' Cars.com direct listings were not directly accessible, though Cars.com-linked records were visible inside AutoTempest results.

AutoTempest.note: Accessible. AutoTempest returned 89+ results for zip 23462, radius 50, max price $10,000, max mileage 150,000. Captured preferred Toyota/Honda/fallback listings where title, URL, price, mileage, and location were visible.

Craigslist Hampton Roads.note: Accessible. Craigslist Hampton Roads cars+trucks search showed current max-$10,000 results in/near Virginia Beach. Captured preferred Toyota/Honda/small-pickup listings with visible price and either visible under-150,000 mileage or explicit mileage-not-visible status; excluded visible over-150,000-mile leads.

eBay Motors.note: Direct eBay Motors query returned an eBay error page/403 in automated access. eBay Motors listings were visible through AutoTempest and are captured when sufficiently verified.

CarGurus.note: Blocked by verification/device check; no direct listings observed.

TrueCar.note: Direct TrueCar search hit a human verification challenge. TrueCar-linked records were visible through AutoTempest only.

Web-indexed local dealer search.note: DuckDuckGo web-indexed query returned an anomaly/captcha page, so no snippet-only leads were usable and no local dealer snippets were inserted.
